abilities.name: Blast Back
abilities.text: After this model is dealt damage by an enemy attack, it may drain a (soulstone) to move the attacker 4" directly away from this model and then make an Inferno marker into base contact with it.

abilities.name: Guttered Ashes
abilities.text: When attacking this model, enemies with a friendly Burning token may not cheat fate.

actions.name: Burn Them Out
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action does not require LoS to target models with a friendly Burning token. The target and enemy models within (aura)2" of the target gain a Burning token. For each raise this action receives, increase the range of the (aura) by 2".

triggers.name: Enthralled
triggers.text: After killing, summon a Witchling Stalker with 4 health in base contact with this model.

actions.name: Guiding Light
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Other ally only. This action may not target the same model more than once per activation. The target declares an attack action, which both ignores LoS and deals +1 damage if it targets a model with a friendly Burning token.

triggers.name: Cleansing Flame
triggers.text: Make an Inferno marker in base contact with the target and remove up to one token from the target.

actions.name: From the Flames
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target an Inferno marker. Make an Inferno marker within 2" of this model, then place this model into base contact with the target and remove the target.

triggers.name: Shelter In Flame
triggers.text: Place an ally within 6" into base contact with the made marker.
